LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 435.5, WHICH REQUIRES COUNSEL TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE FILING SUCH A MOTION. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT HAS UNTIL MAY 17, 2019 TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN CSR# 10276, EMAIL: JCHAN@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Jul-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jun-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC's Motion To Strike Punitive Damages from Plaintiff's Complaint.

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s motion to strike punitive damages allegations from the complaint is GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. The complaint pleads only negligence causes of action, which do not support punitive damages.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Continued To Jun-12-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC's Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiff's Complaint.

Defendant Uber Technologies Inc.'s motion to strike punitive damages is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with CCP 435.5, which requires counsel to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before filing such a motion. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant has until May 17, 2019 to respond to the complaint.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Jacqueline Chan CSR# 10276, email: jchan@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/RBU)
